title: [synthetic-rds] High CPU and Disk Pressure on analytics-prod

commonAnnotations.summary: analytics-prod is showing simultaneous high CPU (91%) and rapidly declining FreeStorageSpace (8 GB remaining). Application is timing out.
commonAnnotations.error: Two independent resource limits are being hit simultaneously: compute and storage.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Write queries are failing. Read queries are timing out. Connection pool is backing up.
